changeSet.author: hephaestus
changeSet.comment: Migrate legacy OpenCode agent configs and frozen snapshots to Pi.
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE agent_config SET agent_type = 'PI' WHERE agent_type = 'OPENCODE';
UPDATE agent_job SET config_snapshot = jsonb_set(config_snapshot, '{agentType}', '"PI"'::jsonb, false) WHERE config_snapshot IS NOT NULL AND config_snapshot ->> 'agentType' = 'OPENCODE';
